Justification.Explanation: LL-18 content has not been provided. Without LL-18 content, we cannot verify refinements, dependencies, or traceability (including interactions with LL-LOC-7.1). The next step is to supply LL-18.xml contents or paste its requirements so a formal findings/implementations document can be generated.

Implementation.Solution: <Requirement ID="LL-18-PLACEHOLDER-1"> <Type>FR</Type> <Name>Placeholder for LL-18 content</Name> <Relationships/> <Content>LL-18 content to be provided by you. This placeholder exists to document that LL-18 analysis cannot proceed until LL-18 content is available.</Content> </Requirement>

Justification.Explanation: High-Level Requirement HL-MAP-2.2 uses the misspelled name "Cell Clasification". This spelling discrepancy affects traceability, reviews, and tooling consistency across HL and LL documents.

Implementation.Solution: <Requirement ID="HL-MAP-2.2"> <Type>FR</Type> <Name>Cell Classification</Name> <Content>Robot shall distinguish between free, blocked, and unknown areas</Content> <Relationships/> </Requirement>

Justification.Explanation: LL-LOC-7.1 currently shows potential redundancy by having a DependsOn LL-EXPL-1.1 alongside a Refines HL-EXPL-1.1. This can create an ambiguous traceability path or cycles if further LL-EXPL changes are introduced. The recommended action is to harmonize to a single, acyclic relation set.

Implementation.Solution: <Requirement ID="LL-LOC-7.1"> <Type>FR</Type> <Name>Localization and Pose Estimation</Name> <Relationships> <Refines>HL-EXPL-1.1</Refines> <DependsOn>LL-EXPL-1.2</DependsOn> <DependsOn>LL-INTERF-6.1</DependsOn> <DependsOn>LL-MAP-2.1</DependsOn> </Relationships> <Content>Robot shall estimate its pose in the environment using sensor fusion and provide pose with uncertainty; Pose updates shall be integrated into the map and planning modules.</Content> </Requirement>

Justification.Explanation: Consistency between HL and LL naming for Cell Classification should be maintained. HL currently uses a misspelled name; aligning HL naming with LL and propagating the corrected term will prevent future traceability issues.

Implementation.Solution:
<Requirement ID="HL-MAP-2.2"> <Type>FR</Type> <Name>Cell Classification</Name> <Content>Robot shall distinguish between free, blocked, and unknown areas</Content> <Relationships/> </Requirement>
<!-- Propagate corrected HL name to LL references and ensure traceability from HL to LL remains coherent. -->
